vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm mở hộp sản phẩm
vocab.example: High-end footwear brands often invest heavily in the unboxing experience to build brand loyalty with online shoppers.
One of the major pitfalls of buying sneakers from third-party websites is the high risk of encountering counterfeit goods.

vocab.meaning: thử đồ ảo (sử dụng công nghệ AR)
vocab.example: Many modern e-commerce platforms now feature a virtual try-on tool, which significantly reduces the guesswork when selecting a style.
I always utilize a price comparison engine to ensure I'm getting the most competitive deal available across multiple retailers.

vocab.meaning: lời chứng thực/đánh giá từ khách hàng
vocab.example: I find customer testimonials much more reliable than the official product description when judging the durability of running shoes.
Before entering my credit card details, I always verify that the site uses a secure payment gateway to protect my financial data.

vocab.meaning: phí vận chuyển và đóng gói
vocab.example: You have to be careful, as a seemingly cheap pair of shoes can become quite expensive once shipping and handling fees are added.

vocab.meaning: phiên bản phát hành độc quyền/giới hạn
vocab.example: I occasionally participate in online raffles for exclusive releases that are simply not available in physical retail stores.

vocab.meaning: bảng hướng dẫn chọn kích cỡ
vocab.example: To avoid the hassle of returns, I meticulously measure my feet and consult the brand's specific size guide before ordering.

vocab.meaning: nội dung do người dùng tạo ra (hình ảnh, video thực tế)
vocab.example: I prefer looking at user-generated content on social media to see how the shoes actually look in natural lighting.
